question_en: My product separated, what to do?
answer_en: Shake it well and see if it becomes uniform. If not, please contact your reseller providing pictures of the product along with proof of purchase.

question_en: What is the shelf life of your products?
answer_en: For our Q²M product line, we state a total shelf-life of 24 months. All latest batches of product have a production date printed on the bottle.

question_en: My product is broken - what should I do?
answer_en: If your product broke during transportation or in storage, please contact your reseller and provide a short description of what happened backed up with pictures. This will allow processing your request as soon as possible.

Q²M GlassPolish can be applied by hand or machine. For best results, we recommend using a rotary polisher (a dual-action machine will also work) with a Q²M Polish Pad (blue).

Use low revs, slow movements, and medium pressure. Work the product until only a light, hazy residue remains. Wipe off the residue with Q²M Prep before proceeding with your coating application..
Open Q²M DeFrost, spray it liberally on the surface, and instantly watch the ice melt.
Spray directly onto a microfibre - wipe on the glass surface till a streak-free finish appear.

For rinseless wash: Mix Q²M ECOWash in a 256:1 solution. Use multiple microfiber towels for the process. Work panel by panel in a straight-line motion to lift dirt safely.

For waterless wash: Mix Q²M ECOWash in a 15:1 solution. Spray generously onto the surface and into a soft microfiber cloth. Wipe in a straight-line motion. Then, use a dry microfiber towel to buff away any residue.

For drying aid: Mix Q²M ECOWash starting from a 20:1 solution. Apply five sprays onto a drying towel and use it to dry your vehicle. Reload the towel with product for each section to maintain effectiveness.

After washing and decontaminating the car, apply Q2M TotalRemover to a wet, clean surface. Spray it liberally onto one panel at a time. Let it sit for about 30 seconds, then rinse thoroughly. For added effectiveness, you can gently agitate the surface with a Q2M SilkMitt Evo. You'll know it's working when the surface no longer feels slick—this means previous protectants have been removed.
